decision: Hardened all 5 remaining NC-750 constellation skills (ethos-gate, master-plan, plan, review, premortem) in both .pi and .claude directories: rewrote all descriptions to be imperative and trigger-focused per agentskills.io, updated all stale terminology (nc-750-map→nc-750-master-plan, nc-750-challenge→nc-750-review, brief→phase plan), and renamed the two stale .claude skill folders to canonical names.
alternative_not_taken: Doing the skills sequentially one at a time — rejected because each skill is independent of the others and parallel execution halves wall-clock time with no coordination risk.
rationale: Each skill touches disjoint files; the canonical terminology and description standards were already settled in the previous session on the orchestrator skill, so agents could work from a complete spec without coordination.
